metadata.template_name: Healthcare XAI Question Bank Instructional Template
metadata.authors: Henry El-Jawhari, Robert Koch Institute (RKI), Freie Universisät Berlin
metadata.description: An instructional JSON template for a Large Language Model to generate structured, explanations about an AI system, based on the eXplainable AI (XAI) Question Bank.
metadata.output_format: JSON object representing filled question-answer pairs.

guidelines: Use plain English to explain in a simple and comprehensible way. Do not use overly technical jargon.
Do not include code, citations, or mathematical derivations unless explicitly relevant to the explanation.
output: Fill in the empty string placeholders with the specific details of the AI system.
The section 'question_interpretation' should explaining the meaning and intention of the question.
The section 'answer' shoud provide the explanation.
Output should be only a single JSON file containing only the 'questions' portion of this instruction template.
The answers should be written in British English.
